{{Expand}}

{{Infobox technique
| name = Elderspawn summoning ritual
| introduced = Of Kings and Killers
}}

== Of Kings and Killers ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|The [[Elderspawn summoning ritual]] is a dangerous ritual where the summoner has no control over the type of spawn or influence over the [[Elderspawn]].<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c19">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 19</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Elder Empire nav}}

[[Category:Techniques]]
[[Category:Of Kings and Killers]]
[[Category:Elder Empire]]
